story.artifact_power: The fungal heart that powers the shaman's trance.
story.greeting: Pirate, your island mission begins now — listen closely.
story.act1: On the Island of Mushrooms, a hypnotic monkey shaman has begun bending minds with glowing spores and ancient rhythms. Travelers who breathe the mist fall under his control, becoming part of his silent tribe. Deep in the fungal forest lies the source of his power — the Heart Cap. Pirate, we need to reach it first and break the shaman's trance before the island is lost.
story.act2: The monkey shaman's spores drift through the air. Every step Pirate takes through the fungal forest pulses with ancient magic — but the path to the Heart Cap is becoming clear.
story.act3: The Heart Cap is within reach. One final push and the shaman's trance over this island will be broken forever.
story.goal: Pirate, master every math trial, reach the island's core in time, and break Doctor Krit's hold.

theory.title: The Heart Cap Must Be Shared Fairly!
story: The monkey shaman uses magical mushrooms to control the island.
To break the spell, Pirate must share the mushrooms fairly.
When a mushroom is split into equal parts, each piece becomes a fraction.

stages.title: Pirate enters Mushroom Island
stages.mechanic_reason: Fill-in-the-blank introduces fraction notation from the theory screen.
stages.success_message: Great work, Pirate! The mushroom trail is clear!

rounds.title: The shaman's rhythm echoes through the trees
The Heart Cap glows in the distance

stages.title: Pirate studies the ancient mushrooms
stages.mechanic_reason: True/false checks understanding of fraction notation.

rounds.title: The shaman tries to confuse Pirate
The path to the Heart Cap opens
rounds.statement: 1 out of 4 equal parts is called a quarter

stages.title: Pirate shares a mushroom
stages.mechanic_reason: Word problems build understanding of fractions in context.

rounds.title: Pirate shares a mushroom
rounds.prompt: A mushroom is split into 2 equal parts. Pirate takes 1 part. What fraction does Pirate have?

rounds.title: The spores drift through the air
rounds.prompt: A mushroom is split into 3 equal parts. Pirate takes 1 part. What fraction does Pirate have?

rounds.title: The shaman watches from afar
rounds.prompt: A mushroom is split into 4 equal parts. Pirate takes 1 part. What fraction does Pirate have?

rounds.title: Pirate finds a giant mushroom
rounds.prompt: Four adventurers share a mushroom equally. Pirate gets one piece. What fraction does Pirate get?

rounds.title: The forest grows quiet
rounds.prompt: Three travelers share a mushroom equally. Pirate gets one piece. What fraction does Pirate get?

stages.title: Pirate follows the glowing path
stages.mechanic_reason: Corridor choice tests recognition of the correct fraction.
stages.success_message: Correct path, Pirate! The Heart Cap grows closer!

rounds.title: Pirate follows the glowing path
rounds.question: Pirate takes 1 part from a mushroom split into 2 equal parts.

rounds.title: The spores swirl around Pirate
rounds.question: Pirate takes 1 part from a mushroom split into 3 equal parts.

rounds.title: The shaman's magic grows stronger
rounds.question: Pirate takes 1 part from a mushroom split into 4 equal parts.

rounds.title: Pirate approaches the Heart Cap
rounds.question: Four adventurers share one mushroom equally.

rounds.title: The trance begins to weaken
rounds.question: Three adventurers share one mushroom equally.

stages.title: Pirate reviews the mushroom symbols
stages.mechanic_reason: Five tasks consolidate fraction vocabulary and notation.

rounds.title: Pirate walks deeper into the forest
Pirate prepares for the final battle

stages.title: Pirate reaches the Heart Cap
stages.mechanic_reason: The boss stage mixes all mechanics for a final fractions challenge.
stages.success_message: Pirate, you've broken the Heart Cap's spell and freed the island!

rounds.title: The shaman casts one last illusion
Pirate breaks the trance
rounds.prompt: A mushroom is split into 4 equal parts. Pirate takes 1 part. What fraction does Pirate have?

rounds.title: The Heart Cap begins to crack
rounds.prompt: Three adventurers share one mushroom equally. Pirate gets one piece. What fraction does Pirate get?

rounds.title: The spores lose their power
rounds.question: Pirate takes 1 part from a mushroom split into 2 equal parts.

rounds.title: The shaman's control fades
rounds.question: Pirate takes 1 part from a mushroom split into 4 equal parts.

rounds.title: The Heart Cap glows one last time
